description_long: This is a rectangular woven handbag made from natural straw or similar plant fibers, featuring a distinctive geometric pattern in dark brown and beige. The front flap is outlined with a black trim and is adorned with a small, pink flower-shaped decorative element with a central button, likely serving as the closure. The back of the handbag displays a more extensive geometric pattern without any additional embellishments. The sides are very slim, indicating a clutch-style design with minimal depth. The overall construction appears lightweight and flexible, suitable for carrying small personal items. The surface texture is visibly rough due to the woven material, giving it a rustic and artisanal appearance.
description: A rectangular woven straw clutch handbag with a geometric pattern, black trim, and a pink flower-shaped closure on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black-trimmed flap, pink flower-shaped closure, and geometric woven pattern.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the slim, flat profile of the handbag with minimal depth.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the full geometric woven pattern without any decorative elements or closures.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the thin, flat construction of the handbag.
attribute_brand_logo: A pink flower-shaped emblem with a central button is present on the front flap; no explicit brand logo is visible.
attribute_strap_type: No visible strap; designed as a clutch to be handheld.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Button or snap closure located at the center of the front flap, integrated into the pink flower-shaped element.
attribute_decorative_elements: Pink flower-shaped decorative element with a central button on the front flap.
attribute_pattern: Geometric woven pattern in dark brown and beige on both front and back surfaces.
